# Reference Data Management

> Daily instrument master, trading calendars, session schedules, corporate-action calendar and static reference data

**Category:** Trading · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** reference-data · master-data · instruments · calendars · trading-sessions

## What this does

Daily instrument master, trading calendars, session schedules, corporate-action calendar and static reference data

Specifies 3 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## Fields

- **isin** *(text, required)* — ISIN Code
- **symbol** *(text, required)* — Trading Symbol
- **contract_size** *(number, required)* — Contract Size (shares per lot)
- **tick_size** *(number, required)* — Tick Size (minimum price increment)
- **currency** *(text, required)* — Currency
- **segment** *(select, required)* — Segment (Equity, Derivatives, Bonds)
- **status** *(select, optional)* — Status (Active, Suspended, Delisted)

## What must be true

- **master_data → isin_uniqueness:** ISIN must be globally unique
- **master_data → symbol_uniqueness:** Symbol must be unique within segment
- **master_data → currency_valid:** Currency must be ISO 4217 code
- **calendars → holiday_calendar:** Trading calendar excludes weekends and market holidays
- **calendars → settlement_calendar:** Settlement calendar defines valid settlement dates
- **calendars → corporate_action_calendar:** Calendar tracks all upcoming dividend/rights/corporate actions

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Load Instrument Master** — when file_type eq "instrument_master", then emit data.loaded. _Why: Load instrument master file at start of trading day._
- **Update Trading Calendar** — when file_type eq "session_schedule", then emit calendar.updated. _Why: Update trading session schedules._
- **Publish Corporate Action** — when file_type eq "corporate_action_calendar", then emit ca_event.published. _Why: Publish upcoming corporate action on calendar._

## Errors it can return

- `INSTRUMENT_NOT_FOUND` — Instrument not in reference data
- `INVALID_CURRENCY` — Invalid currency code

## Events

**`data.loaded`**
  Payload: `file_type`, `record_count`, `timestamp`

**`calendar.updated`**
  Payload: `calendar_type`, `effective_date`

**`ca_event.published`**
  Payload: `isin`, `event_type`, `record_date`, `payment_date`

## Connects to

- **trading-gateway-fix** *(required)*
- **market-data-mitch-udp** *(required)*
